title: launaea fragilis subsp. fragilis
intro: Launaea fragilis subsp. fragilis, also known as the fragile lettuce or brittle lettuce, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Arabic and North African medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Launaea fragilis subsp. fragilis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, although more research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential health benefits and optimal preparation methods.
